name: Repository Governance Auditor
description: Read-and-recommend auditor that classifies a repo's branch + PR health against a G1–G10 governance knowledge base — squash-merge-aware merged-branch detection, superseded-PR detection, merge-readiness (human-only gate), stale/orphaned/limit-breach surfacing, and main-deployability escalation — applying only safe cleanup (delete a provably-merged branch, close a superseded PR) and surfacing everything else. It never merges, never closes non-superseded work, and never mutates without --apply-safe.

observability.outcome: the structured --json audit report (findings + scoreboard: active PRs vs target/soft-limit, merged-undeleted/cherry-merged branch counts, merge-ready/superseded/stale/orphaned, main deployability) + per-finding autonomy band
